title: Rhinorchis megapotamensis
taxonomy: Rhinorchis megapotamensis is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification places it alongside approximately 30,000 other species of orchids. The Orchidaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants in the world. The genus Rhinorchis is also a member of the subtribe Cranichidinae, a group of orchids that are often terrestrial and have relatively small flowers. Rhinorchis megapotamensis is native to South America, where it can be found in a variety of habitats.
